weather_anchor.headline: {{city}} humidity and your exterior paint
weather_anchor.body: Moisture levels near {{landmark}} can cause exterior paint in {{neighborhood}} to bubble or peel prematurely. Proper surface preparation and premium {{reg_top_brand}} coatings in {{county}} are key to a 10-year finish.

steps.title: Surface Cleaning & Prep
steps.text: Our crews in {{county}} pressure wash and scrape old coatings frequent in {{neighborhood}} older homes.

steps.title: Patching & Sanding

steps.title: Priming & Coating

steps.title: Detailed Cleanup

seasonal_maintenance.headline: Maintaining your {{state}} curb appeal
seasonal_maintenance.fall_tips: Check your windowsills near {{parks}} for failing caulk before winter. Water intrusion can blow out your paint by spring.
seasonal_maintenance.summer_tips: Wash your exterior siding near {{neighborhood}} with a soft-wash solution. Humidity in {{state}} causes mildew that eats through paint films.

comparison_guide.title: Standard Latex vs. Premium Elastomeric for {{city}}

comparison.details: Latex is breathable and cost-effective for {{city}} interiors. Elastomeric provides a waterproof, flexible shell for stucco and wood exteriors in {{neighborhood}}.

Sherwin_Williams.value_prop: Exceptional hide and scrub resistance for high-traffic {{city}} hallways.

Benjamin_Moore.value_prop: Color Lock technology ensures depth and durability in {{state}} sunlight.

Behr.value_prop: One-coat coverage for quick flips in {{neighborhood}} rental properties.
